+	it(
+		"compresses common formats to jpeg under the cap",
+		{ timeout: 15_000 },
+		async () => {
+			const formats = [
+				{
+					name: "png",
+					mime: "image/png",
+					make: (buf: Buffer, opts: { width: number; height: number }) =>
+						sharp(buf, {
+							raw: { width: opts.width, height: opts.height, channels: 3 },
+						})

+				},
+				{
+					name: "jpeg",
+					mime: "image/jpeg",

+						})

+							.toBuffer(),
+				},

+					name: "webp",
+					mime: "image/webp",
+					make: (buf: Buffer, opts: { width: number; height: number }) =>

+						})
+							.webp({ quality: 100 })
+							.toBuffer(),
+				},
+			] as const;
